creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I am very sorry for your bad experience with darktable, but I also have 
to say that this PR is close to useless.  I hereby kindly ask you to 
email maintainer (in this case, me) directly instead of spamming GNATS 
next time. 

Now, back to the point: 

- I've obviously checked that darktable 0.5 works both on i386 and amd64, 
otherwise I would not have committed an update; 

- You provided zero information that would give one even slightest clue 
what might be going wrong for you (gdb(1) backtrace, truss(1) output, 
etc.) 

Let's try to work it out though.  Do you know how to debug software 
under Unix?  Please refer to corresponding Handbook chapter if you need 
to refresh your memory.
